---
title: ""
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 60px;">

![](PXL_20220307_012912012.PORTRAIT~1.jpg){width=150px style="border-radius: 50%;"}

<p style="font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: bold;">Srivatsan Balaji</p>

Research Engineer / Faculty Research Assistant <br>
Collaborative Robotics and Intelligent Systems (CoRIS) Institute, Oregon State University

*Interests: Materials and Soft Robotics*

<p>
<a href="cv/CV_SrivatsanBalaji.pdf" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none;">
<i class="fa-solid fa-file-lines" style="color: #85754d;"></i> &nbsp; View CV
</a>
</p>

</div>

<div style="max-width: 1100px; margin: 50px auto; text-align: justify;">


I am a Research Engineer in the Intelligent Machines and Materials Lab, part of Collaborative Robotics and Intelligent Systems (CoRIS) Institute at Oregon State University. I am currently developing hardware for underwater robots. 
My work sits at the intersection of materials, mechanical design and robotics.

I have a Master of Science ([MS]{.slanted}) degree in Mechanical Engineering from the University of Washington, Seattle. Prior to that, I completed my Bachelor of Technology ([B. Tech.]{.slanted}) in Chemical Engineering at SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai, India.

Outside of work, I am a virtual pilot and a hobbyist photographer.

<div style="max-width: 1400px; margin: 40px auto;">

## Skills

**Design & Fabrication**<br>
CAD Modeling; Rapid prototyping; 3D printing: Fused Deposition Modeling (FDM), Stereolithography (SLA), Material Jetting; Silicone Casting; CNC<br>
[Software: SolidWorks, Autodesk Fusion 360, Autodesk Inventor (to some extent)]{.slanted}<br>
[Machines: Prusa FDM Printers, Carbon M1 SLA Printer, Stratasys J750, Bantam Desktop CNC]{.slanted}

**Testing & Analysis**<br>
Finite Element Analysis (FEA); Material Characterization<br>
[Software: Ansys Mechanical, MATLAB, Ansys Fluent (CFD) - fundamental fluid flow analysis]{.slanted}<br>
[Testing: Instron Universal Testing System]{.slanted}

**Programming**<br>
Python

**Research**<br>
Experiment Design, Scientific and Technical Writing, Presentation

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 120px; margin: 60px auto; max-width: 1200px; flex-wrap: wrap;">

<a href="https://www.washington.edu" target="_blank">
<img src="./logos/uw-purple.png" class="light-mode-img" style="height: 90px;">
<img src="./logos/uw-white.png" class="dark-mode-img" style="height: 90px;">
</a>

<a href="https://oregonstate.edu" target="_blank">
<img src="./logos/OSU_horizontal_2C_O_over_B.png" class="light-mode-img" style="height: 90px;">
<img src="./logos/OSU_horizontal_2C_O_over_W.png" class="dark-mode-img" style="height: 90px;">
</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>
